content: You appear to be stuck on [Use find_route to get route to Procyon first. Then use the jump command with the exact system ID 'procyon'. Do NOT use scan, explore, or any other command before jumping. Just: find_route to procyon, then jump to procyon. You should end up in the Procyon system. If the jump succeeds, navigate to Procyon Colonial Station using travel/navigate. Confirm you are in Procyon by checking your location.] in phase active for 15 minutes. Assess your current situation and either continue or abandon and replan.
